title: pleurolobus paniculatus
intro: Pleurolobus paniculatus, also known as Kalanode, is a plant species belonging to the family Rubiaceae. This plant is used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Pleurolobus paniculatus include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and exhibit antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
